'''wawugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uzvar|uzvar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uzvar|uzvar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wawugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæwigith|wæwigith]] || [[word:wæwigij|wæwigij]] || [[word:wæwigish|wæwigish]] || [[word:wæwigi|wæwigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wawuwuguth|wawuwuguth]] || [[word:wawuwuguj|wawuwuguj]] || [[word:wawuwugush|wawuwugush]] || [[word:wawuwugu|wawuwugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wawuguth|wawuguth]] || [[word:wawuguj|wawuguj]] || [[word:wawugush|wawugush]] || [[word:wawugu|wawugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wawufguth|wawufguth]] || [[word:wawufguj|wawufguj]] || [[word:wawufgush|wawufgush]] || [[word:wawufguf|wawufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wawuguthu|wawuguthu]] || [[word:wawuguju|wawuguju]] || [[word:wawugushu|wawugushu]] || [[word:wawuguku|wawuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wawuguth|wawuguth]] || [[word:wawuguj|wawuguj]] || [[word:wawugush|wawugush]] || [[word:wawugu|wawugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wawuguthul|wawuguthul]] || [[word:wawugujul|wawugujul]] || [[word:wawugushul|wawugushul]] || [[word:wawugukul|wawugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wawuguthuthu|wawuguthuthu]] || [[word:wawugujuju|wawugujuju]] || [[word:wawugushushu|wawugushushu]] || [[word:wawuguku|wawuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wawuguthun|wawuguthun]] || [[word:wawugujun|wawugujun]] || [[word:wawugushun|wawugushun]] || [[word:wawugukun|wawugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wawuguthuoro|wawuguthuoro]] || [[word:wawugujuoro|wawugujuoro]] || [[word:wawugushuoro|wawugushuoro]] || [[word:wawugukuoro|wawugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
